rationale.D1: Confirmed command-based baseline with SubsystemBase subclasses (Shooter, Intake) owning TalonFX motors directly and CTRE-generated swerve as vendored abstraction; no IO interfaces found anywhere in the codebase, discounting the mechanical candidate of 1 as accurate.
rationale.D2: Confirmed command composition via RobotContainer button bindings and NamedCommands for auto, with sequential/parallel command groups (AimAndShoot, GoAndShoot, TrackCode); no FSM, no Superstructure coordinator, no state enums found.
rationale.D3: Confirmed only a token sim: CTRE internal sim notifier in CommandSwerveDrivetrain startSimThread() updates swerve state, but simulationPeriodic() in Robot.java is empty and no WPILib physics sim classes (ElevatorSim, etc.) exist for any mechanism.
rationale.D4: No src/test directory exists and no .github/workflows CI files found; score is 0.
rationale.D5: Confirmed structured NetworkTables publishing (StructPublisher for Pose/ChassisSpeeds/SwerveModuleState) plus CTRE SignalLogger for drivetrain data and custom WebServer dashboard; more than raw SmartDashboard but below DogLog/Epilogue/AdvantageKit coverage across subsystems — mechanisms only publish via WebServer.putNumber.
rationale.D6: Confirmed PathPlanner fully wired: AutoBuilder.configure in CommandSwerveDrivetrain, NamedCommands registered, 6 .auto files and 6 .path files used, PPHolonomicDriveController configured with real PID gains; no Choreo trajectories.
rationale.D7: Confirmed Limelight-based pose estimation: EstimatePose command calls LimelightHelpers.getBotPoseEstimate_wpiBlue and drivetrain.addVisionMeasurement with timestamp across 1 configured camera; no std-dev tuning, no IO interface, no multi-camera fusion beyond sequential cycling.
rationale.D8: Confirmed real README with feature list and IP/port deploy info, plus two library/template repos (AutoSwerveAndIntakeTemplate, ScrappyBot) indicating onboarding infrastructure; no CI workflows and no formatter/checkstyle configured.
